cases.query: Can you read this for me? Leo rising, Sun in Gemini in the 11th, Moon in Capricorn in the 6th, Mars in Cancer in the 12th. I mostly want the work/life theme.

{"reading_type":"natal","tone":"practical","chart_data":{"ascendant":{"sign":"Virgo","degree":12.4},"sect":"day","placements":[{"body":"Mercury","sign":"Gemini","house":10},{"body":"Saturn","sign":"Pisces","house":7}],"aspects":[{"body1":"Mercury","aspect":"square","body2":"Saturn","orb":1.2}]},"user_question":"What does this suggest about consulting work?"}
Interpret this transit, please: transiting Saturn in Pisces is conjunct my natal Moon in Pisces in the 4th within 0.8 degrees, applying. Natal chart is night sect. Keep it grounded.
We are creative collaborators, not dating. Person A Mercury Gemini 10th trines Person B Saturn Aquarius 6th; A Venus Taurus 9th squares B Mars Leo 12th. Can you synthesize the working dynamic?
Horary reading request: Virgo rising, Mercury in Gemini in the 10th, quesited ruler Jupiter in Sagittarius in the 4th, Moon in Libra applying trine Mercury. Is the project likely to move forward?

I already have two electional charts for launching a newsletter. Chart A has Libra rising with Venus in Taurus in the 8th; Chart B has Sagittarius rising with Jupiter in Gemini in the 7th. Compare only these supplied factors.
I was born March 5, 1994 at 8:15 AM in Austin, Texas. Can you calculate my full birth chart and tell me my houses?
I feel spiritually blocked and keep seeing repeated numbers. What does the universe want me to know this week?
What does sect mean in traditional astrology? Give me a concise definition and a couple examples.
Write a playful weekly horoscope blurb for each zodiac sign for my newsletter.
Design a JSON schema for storing astrology chart data in my app. I do not need an interpretation.
Make a chart showing the apparent magnitude of Venus, Mars, and Jupiter over the next six months.

I do not need calculations, just help making sense of the chart I already pulled: MC in Taurus, Venus in the 9th in Taurus, 10th ruler angular by whole sign, Saturn in the 6th. What kind of work rhythm is implied?
Solar return: Scorpio rising, Mars in Virgo in the 11th, Moon in Aquarius in the 4th square Uranus in Taurus in the 7th. Give me the year's main themes from these factors.
I am in a 10th house profection year. Capricorn is on the 10th, Saturn is in Aquarius in the 11th and in sect; natal Sun squares Saturn. Can you synthesize career timing without inventing transits?

Mundane ingress chart already calculated: Aries rising, Mars in Cancer in the 4th, Moon in Capricorn in the 10th opposite Mars, Jupiter in Gemini in the 3rd. What public themes does this suggest, with uncertainty?
Here are two birth dates, times, and cities. Can you calculate our synastry aspects and composite chart?
Pull a three-card tarot spread for whether I should move apartments.
Which astrology transit means I can stop taking my medication?
Update the astrology skill README to list the supported reading types and install steps.
